EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} reconfigured virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is upgrading virtual hardware on virtual machine "{object.name}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} upgraded virtual hardware on a virtual machine on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is renamed on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to upgrade virtual hardware on a virtual machine on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
